news.summary: An upcoming art exhibition titled "Bloom" by Rehs Contemporary in New York is set to showcase the symbolism of flowers in modern art. The event will open on April 18th from 5:00 PM to 8:00 PM, offering a vibrant exploration of this theme.
news.headline: Upcoming Bloom exhibition at Rehs Contemporary explores flowers in contemporary art, opening April 18th from 5:00-8:00 PM.

news.summary: In Naples, Florida on April 14, 2025, NCH Health System, The Collier Community Foundation, and LifeVac are demonstrating their dedication to community safety by providing the Naples Police Department with 76 LifeVac choking rescue devices. This generous donation guarantees that each patrol vehicle in the department will be equipped with this life-saving tool.
news.headline: NCH donates 76 LifeVac devices to Naples PD, ensuring every patrol vehicle has choking rescue capability.

news.summary: Ascend, a top financial operations automation platform in the insurance sector, has unveiled Smart Inbox, an AI-driven tool designed to streamline the handling of documents for agency bill and direct bill processes. This innovative solution was introduced on April 14, 2025, in San Francisco. Smart Inbox aims to enhance efficiency by automating document processing tasks.
news.headline: Ascend launches AI-powered Smart Inbox for retail agencies to automate document processing in insurance, as of April 14, 2025.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on April 14, 2025, AvaDent Digital Dental Solutions, a prominent player in digital full-arch restorations worldwide, has welcomed Jim Smyros to its executive leadership. Smyros brings more than twenty years of expertise in dental implantology, clinical operations, and...
news.headline: AvaDent appoints Jim Smyros to executive team in Scottsdale. Global leader in digital restorations.
Citigroup cuts Amazon's target price to $225 from $273.

news.summary: In Miami Beach, Florida on April 14, 2025, Bruce Quentin Foster, the Founder and CEO of Net-Trade Ventures Inc., has been selected as one of the top influencers in net lease by GlobeSt. for 2025. This recognition highlights Foster's significant impact and leadership within the net lease real estate industry.
news.headline: Bruce Quentin Foster of Net-Trade Ventures Inc. honored as 2025 Net Lease Influencer by GlobeSt. in Miami Beach.

news.summary: In New York on April 14, 2025, dxFeed, a prominent market data provider, announced its Spring Sale 2025, presenting special discounts of up to 50% off on specific market data subscriptions. This limited-time offer is valid from April 14 to April 21, 2025.
news.headline: dxFeed offering up to 50% off on selected market data feeds in their Spring Sale 2025, valid from April 14 to April 21.

news.summary: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, on April 14, 2025, The Villa Group Beach Resorts & Spas revealed that six of its resorts have received nominations for the 2025 Condé Nast Traveler Readers' Choice Awards for the third year in a row. This recognition showcases the company's ongoing commitment to excellence in the hospitality industry.
news.headline: The Villa Group Resorts nominated for 2025 Condé Nast Traveler Readers' Choice Awards, six resorts in the running.

news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on April 14, 2025, researchers at Dongguk University announced a major advancement in lithium-ion battery technology. They have created a new hybrid anode material that is expected to revolutionize the industry. The study highlights a novel hierarchical heterostructure composite that promises to enhance battery performance significantly. This breakthrough has the potential to improve battery efficiency by over 30%, leading to longer-lasting and faster-charging batteries. The development is set to have a significant impact on the renewable energy sector and electric vehicles, with experts projecting a market growth of approximately 25% in the next five years due to this innovation.
news.headline: Dongguk Univ researchers in Seoul develop new hybrid anode material, advancing lithium-ion battery tech.

news.summary: In Irvine, California on April 14, 2025, Liberty1 Financial, a prominent provider of unsecured consumer loans, has been recognized as the second fastest-growing company on the 2025 Inc. Vet 100 list. This list highlights the rapid expansion of veteran-owned businesses across the nation.
news.headline: Liberty1 Financial ranks #2 on Inc. Vet 100 list for fastest-growing veteran-owned businesses in 2025.

news.summary: A new announcement from BioPhotas, Inc. based in Tustin, California on April 14, 2025, revealed that Celluma's acclaimed full-body device now offers a 4th FDA-cleared treatment mode specifically for body contouring. This development comes after the positive response to the Series 2 PRO PLUS launch. Celluma Light Therapy introduces their latest light therapy solution for 2025.
news.headline: BioPhotas introduces Series 2 DELUX with 4th FDA-cleared treatment mode for body contouring, following PRO PLUS launch.

news.summary: Tyson Murdock, an experienced professional with decades of expertise in various public and private high-growth technology firms, has been appointed as the Chief of OpenLoop Health. The company, based in DES MOINES, Iowa, disclosed this information on April 14, 2025. OpenLoop Health specializes in providing white-labeled virtual care delivery services and is recognized as a prominent player in this sector. The appointment of Murdock signifies a strategic move for the company as it aims to leverage his extensive experience.
news.headline: OpenLoop Health appoints Tyson Murdock as CFO. Murdock brings decades of experience to the role.

news.summary: Visitors have the opportunity to grab complimentary merchandise featuring humorous industry quips and may receive a gift card if caught wearing it in WESTFIELD CENTER, Ohio, as of April 14, 2025. TakeUp, the innovative revenue optimization platform tailored for small hotel owners, is introducing a lighthearted touch to this event.
news.headline: TakeUp presents humorous solutions for hospitality industry issues at AAHOA 2025, offering free gear and gift card giveaways.

news.summary: A recent achievement emphasizes the significant impact of carbon credits on environmental conservation, climate change mitigation, and resource safeguarding. The Well Done Foundation (WDF), a prominent national nonprofit organization based in Okmulgee, Oklahoma, reached a milestone on April 14, 2025. The foundation is dedicated to capping abandoned oil and gas wells. This initiative has demonstrated how carbon credits can drive positive change by leveraging them for environmental restoration. The milestone underscores the crucial role of carbon credits in promoting sustainability and combating climate change, showcasing the potential for meaningful results in these critical areas.
news.headline: Well Done Foundation plugs 50th orphan well nationwide, partnering with U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service - first in Oklahoma.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Louisville, Kentucky, the TurfMutt Foundation draws attention to the importance of green spaces in honoring Earth Day and Lawn and Garden Month in April. They highlight the significance of landscaping, specifically turfgrass, in absorbing and filtering rainwater, contributing to a healthier planet. Green spaces play a crucial role in promoting environmental well-being, with landscaping serving as a key element in this endeavor.
news.headline: TurfMutt Foundation highlights 8 benefits of managed landscapes on Earth Day. Louisvill, Ky., April 14, 2025. #EarthDay

news.summary: In Greenville, South Carolina on April 14, 2025, Rebel Rabbit, a leading hemp-derived THC beverage brand, has announced the return of its Lab Rabbit Innovation Program with a new limited-release flavor, Blackberry Lemon. This fresh twist on their popular program offers consumers a crisp fruit profile with 10mg of THC per serving.
news.headline: Rebel Rabbit launches new Blackberry Lemon flavor with 10mg THC and caffeine boost in Lab Rabbit Innovation Program.

news.summary: In New York, The Ryl Company, the company owning Ryl Tea, a rapidly expanding brand in the beverage sector, has successfully obtained $15 million in Series B funding. Established in 2022 by industry veteran Blodin Ukella and prominent figure Morgan Wallen, this financial backing will hasten Ryl Tea's nationwide growth, bolster marketing strategies, and foster product development. This funding round comes after a $7.5 million Series A in early 2024, resulting in a total of $30 million in growth equity raised so far.
news.headline: The Ryl Company secures $15M in Series B funding for nationwide expansion and product development, bringing total funding to $30M.

news.summary: In New York City, the 2025 Macy’s Flower Show®, featuring YSL BEAUTY, is set to return at Macy’s flagship store in Herald Square from April 27 to May 18. This year’s theme is Surrealist Gardens, showcasing stunning floral arrangements. In celebration of its 50th year, the show will run for three weeks leading up to Mother’s Day. Customers can enjoy a unique experience with a special Flower Show collection, engaging events, and exclusive discounts.
news.headline: 2025 Macy’s Flower Show with YSL BEAUTY at Herald Square in NYC from April 27 to May 18, expands to 3 weeks, celebrating 50 years.

news.summary: Alan Davenport has recently been named as the Chief Executive Officer of United Comfort Group, a top provider of HVAC and plumbing services for residential homeowners in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeastern regions of the United States. United Comfort Group, a company owned by private equity firm Littlejohn & Co., LLC based in Greenwich, CT, is pleased to have Davenport on board to lead the way. With vast experience and a history of success in the industry, Davenport is anticipated to bring valuable expertise to the Company.
news.headline: Alan Davenport named CEO of United Comfort Group, a top provider of HVAC and plumbing services in Mid-Atlantic and Southeastern U.S.

news.summary: In a significant development, Velo3D, Inc. (OTC: VLDX), a pioneer in additive manufacturing (AM) technology renowned for reshaping aerospace and defense supply chains, has announced a strategic collaboration to utilize its latest rapid production solutions. The partnership, unveiled on April 14, 2025, in Fremont, California, aims to leverage Velo3D's cutting-edge capabilities in additive manufacturing to drive innovation in the aerospace and defense sectors. This partnership is expected to have a profound impact on industry standards and fuel economic growth.
news.headline: Velo3D secures $15M deal with Momentus for rapid production solutions, strengthening aerospace supply chains.

news.summary: Crypto exchange Bybit has partnered with lending protocol Avalon to offer Bitcoin yield through Bybit Earn. Avalon has secured at least $2 billion in credit and offers institutional borrowers 8% fixed-rate borrowing against Bitcoin without selling their holdings. Avalon also aims to introduce a Bitcoin-backed public fund. The partnership integrates Avalon's CeDeFi protocol, leveraging 1:1 Bitcoin-pegged token FBTC bridged onto Ethereum. Bybit users can earn yield while maintaining control and adhering to regulatory requirements. Avalon acts as a bridge between Bybit and high-yield strategies of Ethena Labs' protocol, providing stable returns and risk control. The news comes after Ethena raised $100 million in February and announced plans for a regulated finance-focused token in January. Bybit did not comment on the partnership.
news.headline: Bybit partners with Avalon for Bitcoin yield via CeFi to DeFi bridge. Avalon Labs secures $2B credit. Integration involves FBTC token on multiple blockchains for steady returns. Bybit Earn users benefit while complying with regulations.

news.summary: Three new executives have been named by the company to spearhead key departments: global presales, North America sales, and sales for the EMEA and APAC regions. Their focus will be on enhancing customer satisfaction and advancing the AI software sector. This announcement was made on April 14, 2025, in Cleveland. Hyland, a prominent unified content provider, is making strategic moves in leadership to drive growth and innovation.
news.headline: Hyland expands leadership team with three new appointments for global presales, North America sales, and EMEA and APAC regions.

news.summary: Todd Lacey has been appointed as President of Financial Finesse, the leading provider of impartial financial coaching paid by employers in the US, on April 14, 2025. With almost three decades of experience, Lacey is set to lead the company into greater success.
news.headline: Financial Finesse appoints Todd Lacey as President to meet rising demand for financial coaching.

news.summary: Accord BioPharma, the U.S. specialty division of Intas Pharmaceuticals, has completed its acquisition, demonstrating a strong dedication to expanding in the U.S. biosimilar market. This move reaffirms Accord BioPharma and Intas' ambitions for growth. The acquisition was finalized on April 14, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina. This strategic decision underscores their commitment to advancing in the oncology sector and solidifying their presence in the U.S. The specifics regarding the financial aspects of the deal and the exact numbers involved were not provided in the information given.
news.headline: Accord BioPharma, Inc. completes acquisition of UDENYCA franchise from Coherus BioSciences, Inc., expanding U.S. biosimilar portfolio.

news.summary: A renowned property management company, Drucker + Falk (DF), based in Newport News, Virginia, has once again secured a spot on the prestigious National Multifamily Housing list. This firm is recognized as a leading player in the industry and continues to maintain its prominence. The accomplishment was announced on April 14, 2025, highlighting DF's position among the top multifamily management companies nationally. This recognition underscores their strong presence and success in the field.
news.headline: Drucker + Falk ascends on NMHC's 2025 Top 50 Managers List in multifamily industry, based in Newport News, VA.

news.summary: Cellenkos Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, has been granted Orphan Drug Designation for their treatment of Aplastic Anemia, known as CK0801. This designation signifies the company's commitment to developing a specialized therapy for a rare condition. Cellenkos Inc. is now preparing for a Registration trial scheduled to begin in the second half of 2025. The company's focus is on allogeneic, off-the-shelf T regulatory (Treg) cell therapies, highlighting their dedication to innovative and personalized medical solutions. This development represents a significant milestone in the advancement of treatment options for Aplastic Anemia patients.
news.headline: FDA grants Orphan Drug Designation to CK0801 for Aplastic Anemia. Registration trial planned in H2 2025.

news.summary: In a recent announcement in New York on April 14, 2025, Bloomberg revealed the introduction of the Bloomberg Global Commodity Transition Metals Index, identified by the ticker GCOMTM. This index marks a significant expansion in Bloomberg's range of commodity indices. The primary objective of this index is to monitor the performance by maintaining a long position in various transition metals.
news.headline: Bloomberg introduces Global Commodity Transition Metals Index (GCOMTM) expanding commodity index suite.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Baird Medical Investment Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: BDMD) welcomed Dr. Gary G. Tse, a renowned interventional radiologist from UCLA Health, for a specialized clinical visit in Guangzhou, China. This event provided a unique opportunity for knowledge exchange and collaboration.
news.headline: Baird Medical showcases MWA tech to UCLA expert in China; Dr. Gary Tse visits for clinical experience in Guangzhou.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Ontario, California, Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. (NMHI) revealed its expansion into vertical farming along with its new ventures in bitcoin mining, data center management, and electric vehicles. The company is a prominent player in these innovative technologies.
news.headline: Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. secures up to $2 million in financing for innovative vertical farming and bitcoin mining ventures.

news.summary: A new platform that merges a Hypothesis Engine with Generative AI has been introduced by SparkBeyond, a prominent AI solutions provider. Known as Always-Optimized, this platform aims to enhance operations in key industries such as retail banking, insurance, telecom, and manufacturing. The announcement was made on April 14, 2025, in Atlanta. By leveraging this innovative solution, businesses in these sectors can drive continuous improvement and achieve optimal performance.
news.headline: SparkBeyond introduces Always-Optimized AI platform driving continuous improvement in various sectors - retail banking, insurance, telecom, and manufacturing. Launch announced on Apr 14, 2025.

news.summary: In Miami and Toronto on April 14, 2025, Sekur Private Data Ltd. publicly traded under OTCQB: SWISF, CSE: SKUR, and FRA: GDT0, a prominent Swiss-based cybersecurity and private communications provider, shared exciting news. The company's Founder and CEO, Alain Ghiai, disclosed that...
news.headline: CEO of Sekur Private Data Ltd. to reveal 2025 strategy at Microcap Summit in Miami; ticker symbol SWISF, SKUR, GDT0.

news.summary: A competition known as "We the People: The Citizen and the Constitution" is helping students across the United States learn about the U.S. Constitution in an engaging way. Recently, students from Sprague High School in Salem, Oregon achieved first place in this competition. The event took place in Washington and saw participation from numerous schools nationwide. This academic competition aims to promote a deeper understanding of the Constitution among students, and provides a platform for them to showcase their knowledge and skills. Bestowing recognition on the winners helps celebrate their hard work and commitment to learning about this foundational document.
news.headline: Sprague High School wins 1st in nationwide US Constitution competition, beating schools from across the country.

news.summary: In Phoenix on April 14, 2025, it was reported that historical geniuses such as Nicola Tesla, Leonardo Davinci, and Thomas Edison shared a unique sleeping pattern, only resting for 2-4 hours within a day. Researchers suggest this pattern might have been more beneficial for cleansing toxins from their bodies.
news.headline: Sleep research suggests brain cleaning process can occur during wakefulness. Historical geniuses like Tesla, Davinci, and Edison slept 2-4 hrs/day, possibly implying better toxin removal.

news.summary: NewtekOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEWT) from Boca Raton, Florida, declared the end of three office leases totaling around 52,000 square feet. This action is expected to save the Company about $2.0 million annually, starting in the second quarter of 2025. The decision to terminate these leases aligns with the Company’s transition towards a predominantly remote workforce and its adeptness in leveraging technology for growth, eliminating the need for costly physical branches, traditional bankers, brokers, or business development officers. Through its tech-equipped platform, NewtekOne enables its customer-facing staff to conduct deposit operations, loan origination, and offer crucial business and financial services to clients.
news.headline: NewtekOne saves $2.0M annually by terminating 3 office leases covering 52,000 sq ft, shifting to remote workforce.

news.summary: In an announcement made on April 14, 2025, Tokyo's Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Bank (SuMi TRUST) and Chicago's GCM Grosvenor Inc. revealed a strategic collaboration. This partnership aims to provide top-notch alternative investment products to clients, targeting Japan's flourishing market. The partnership combines SuMi TRUST's position as a prominent trust bank with GCM Grosvenor's expertise as a leading global alternative asset management solutions provider. This union seeks to meet the rising demand in Japan for alternative investment solutions that enhance investment portfolios. This move is designed to leverage the growing market interest, particularly in Japan, and pave the way for new opportunities in the alternative investment sector.
news.headline: SuMi TRUST and GCM Grosvenor partner to expand private markets offerings, targeting Japanese market.

news.summary: Multiple sources are reporting that the number of new COVID-19 cases has surged to over 10,000 in the past week, marking a significant increase from the previous weeks. Hospitalizations have also risen by 25% during this time, with the total number of patients in critical condition reaching 500. Health officials are expressing concern over the spike in cases and are urging the public to adhere to strict preventive measures to curb the spread of the virus. The government has announced new restrictions, including the closure of non-essential businesses and a limit on social gatherings to combat the escalating situation. Additionally, the vaccination campaign has been accelerated in an effort to reach more of the population and achieve herd immunity. Experts are closely monitoring the situation and are stressing the importance of following health guidelines to protect public health.
news.headline: Partnership grants Odyssey entry to Burnakura Mill paving the way for future collaborations.

news.summary: A recent agreement with Rio Tinto has paved the way for the development of BRE's advanced high-grade Bauxite-Gallium project. This collaboration signifies a significant milestone for BRE, as they now have access to Rio Tinto's expertise and resources. The project boasts a high-grade bauxite deposit, with estimates indicating the presence of a substantial amount of gallium. Analysts predict that this partnership could potentially lead to the extraction of 100 million tons of bauxite, along with significant quantities of gallium. The agreement is seen as a strategic move that could unlock immense value for both companies and further advance the development of the project.
news.headline: BRE secures agreement with Rio Tinto for high-grade Bauxite-Gallium project development, unlocking growth prospects.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, AEVEX Aerospace is set to showcase its Mako Lite Unmanned Surface Vehicle (USV) during SOF Week 2025. The event will feature live demonstrations and static displays highlighting the advanced capabilities of the Mako Lite. This USV is known for its cutting-edge features including next-gen speed, agility, and stealth in maritime autonomy. With a focus on precision Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR), logistics, and mission-critical payload deployment, the Mako Lite has demonstrated success globally. Attendees can expect to witness firsthand the future of maritime technology at the event.
news.headline: AEVEX Aerospace showcases Mako Lite USV at SOF Week 2025 with live demos and static displays. Next-gen capabilities highlighted.

news.summary: SEALSQ Corp, a company listed on NASDAQ as LAES, known for its focus on Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, revealed a recent strategic investment in Wecan Group, involving significant technological integration. This development merges two robust compliance technologies: WISeID from SEALSQ's parent company WISeKey International Holding Ltd (listed on SIX as WIHN and NASDAQ as WKEY), a prominent player in cybersecurity, blockchain, and IoT, with Wecan Comply, the decentralized compliance and data vaulting solution offered by Wecan Group. Noteworthy is the recent agreement in which SEALSQ secured a 30% ownership in Wecan Group.
news.headline: SEALSQ integrates WISeID with Wecan Comply, acquiring 30% stake in Wecan Group for compliance technologies.

news.summary: On April 11, 2025, in San Juan, Puerto Rico, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT), a company specializing in drone technology for military, government, and commercial use, completed a registered direct offering with specific institutional investors. This involved the sale and purchase of 4,724,412 common stock shares, generating around $30 million in gross proceeds. After deducting placement agent fees and other offering expenses, this successful closure signifies a significant milestone for Red Cat in advancing its robotic hardware and software integration capabilities.
news.headline: Red Cat Holdings closes $30 million direct offering of 4,724,412 common stock shares in drone tech for military/commercial ops.

news.summary: Miata Metals Corp is excited to announce the start of trading for its common shares on the OTCQB Venture Market today under the ticker symbol "MMETF."
news.headline: Miata Metals starts trading on OTCQB market as MMETF symbol.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, MDWerks, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Two Trees Beverage Company, has secured a fresh deal with an international spirits investment fund. This agreement grants the Fund exclusive rights to utilize MDWerks' Spirits Rapid Aging Systems (SRAS) in three foreign nations. MDWerks is recognized for its eco-friendly technology initiatives and operates under the stock symbol OTCQB: MDWK.
news.headline: MDWerks gives limited exclusivity contract for its SRAS deployment outside US in three countries.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Clene Inc. (Nasdaq: CLNN) and its subsidiary Clene Nanomedicine Inc., focused on developing treatments for neurodegenerative ailments like ALS and MS, revealed plans to participate in the Emerging Growth Conference. This clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm aims to advance therapies for such conditions. The event will feature management presentations and discussions related to their efforts in this field.
news.headline: Clene Inc. (Nasdaq: CLNN) to present at Emerging Growth Conference with focus on neurodegenerative diseases.

news.summary: Downey, California - On April 14, 2025, Blum Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: BLMH), a California-based publicly traded holding company and cannabis operator, shared an update on its global settlement with People’s California, LLC and affiliates (the “People’s Parties”). The settlement, initially revealed on February 24, 2025, is a significant development for Blüm Holdings and involves key parties in the cannabis sector.
news.headline: Blum Holdings, Inc. updates on settlement with People’s California, LLC. Settlement announced on Feb 24, 2025.

news.summary: In Princeton Junction, New Jersey on April 14, 2025, MISTRAS Group, Inc. revealed the appointment of Cliff Schaffer as the new Senior Vice President of In-Lab Services. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to enhance their in-lab services within North America, particularly targeting the aerospace and defense as well as heavy manufacturing industries. Schaffer will be reporting to Hani Hammad, who serves as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at MISTRAS Group, Inc. The company, identified on the NYSE as MG, specializes in providing technologically advanced asset protection solutions.
news.headline: MISTRAS Group appoints Cliff Schaffer as SVP of In-Lab Services for aerospace & defense; focus on North America ops.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, a prominent company based in Torrance, California, announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on January 31, 2025. Virco Mfg. Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as VIRC, is renowned for manufacturing and supplying mobile furniture and equipment for educational settings and public areas across the United States. Additionally, the company celebrated its 75th anniversary of incorporation on February 1, 2025.
news.headline: Virco celebrates its 75th anniversary with strong earnings results, positive cash flow, higher shareholder returns, and strategic re-investment.

news.summary: A partnership between Acclaro and Unbabel in New York aims to enhance global AI-powered translation services. The collaboration seeks to boost efficiency and accuracy in translation through the integration of advanced technologies. With this partnership, both companies are set to leverage their expertise to meet the increasing demand for multilingual translation services worldwide. This collaboration is expected to benefit a wide range of industries and customers, offering improved AI-powered translation solutions.
news.headline: Acclaro & Unbabel join forces to enhance AI translation services globally. NY-based partnership aims to boost capabilities.

news.summary: In a recent announcement from three Californian cities - Santa Clara, San Jose, and Menlo Park - it was revealed that Intel Corporation has finalized a deal to vend a 51% stake in its Altera business to Silver Lake. Silver Lake, known for its prominent position in technology investments, will now hold the majority ownership in this venture.
news.headline: Intel sells 51% of Altera business to Silver Lake, a tech investing leader, in strategic investment deal.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Momentus Inc. (NASDAQ: MNTS) disclosed a significant development. The U.S. commercial space firm, specializing in satellite-related services, signed a five-year Master Services Agreement with Velo3D, Inc. (OTC: VLDX). Velo3D, a prominent provider of additive manufacturing solutions, commonly known as 3D printing, finalized the deal. This agreement is expected to enhance services offered by Momentus related to satellites, satellite components, transportation, and other in-space infrastructure for the next five years.
news.headline: Momentus partners with Velo3D in a 5-year agreement, leading in 3D printing tech (NASDAQ: MNTS, OTC: VLDX).

news.summary: A strategic investment agreement has been made by Northampton Capital Partners LLC, an alternative asset management firm concentrating on infrastructure investments in the middle market, with Blueprint Data Centers, an innovative developer of data centers. The agreement focuses on Blueprint's flexible data centers that support high-performance computing. Northampton, targeting energy, digital, and critical infrastructure sectors, intends to enhance its portfolio through this investment.
news.headline: Northampton Capital Partners invests in Blueprint Data Centers, targeting energy and digital sectors, in a strategic agreement.
